name: Illustrator / AI vector files
requires: Python 3.10+ and optional .[illustrator-trace] for offline color tracing
Adobe Illustrator desktop, PowerShell, and Illustrator.Application COM only for desktop flows
supported_tasks: offline color raster to verified editable SVG preview
authorized reference and sandbox preview comparison
bounded deterministic color vector repair planning with dry-run execute and compare templates
confirmed local Illustrator color trace to sandbox AI/SVG/PNG
unsupported_tasks: production photo, gradient, transparency, or text fidelity
safety_notes: Do not commit customer .ai files, source images, exported SVG/PDF/PNG files, commercial fonts, or brushes.
The offline color trace accepts one explicit input and writes only below ignored examples/output/illustrator/trace-practice.
Input image and desktop export paths must be passed as parameters.
Keep ILLUSTRATOR_EXE and local artwork paths outside the repository.
